description: LinkedPara (sz=32, Arial) linked to LinkedChar (bold=on, basedOn BaseChar(underline=on, color=0000FF, highlight=yellow)). Tests that char style's basedOn properties reach runs via linked overlay, without overwriting para style's explicit properties.

expected.para_1: sz=32 (para), Arial (para), bold=ON (char raw), underline=ON (char basedOn), color=0000FF (char basedOn), highlight=yellow (char basedOn)
expected.para_2: explicit LinkedChar on run: bold=ON, underline=ON, color=0000FF, highlight=yellow (all from resolved char chain). sz=32 (para, since char chain doesn't set sz).
